overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a sci-fi mech or aircraft navigating through a dark rocky canyon at dusk, exiting over open water toward distant target platforms. Game engine footage featuring immersive HUD elements and atmospheric low-light conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: piloting the aircraft through a narrow canyon passage between dark rocky cliffs, maintaining steady altitude above the water below

entered.detail: steep dark rock face forming the left wall of the canyon passage
steep dark rock face forming the right wall of the canyon passage
narrow winding passage between the cliff walls leading into the distance
dark water visible at the bottom of the canyon below the flight path

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a narrow canyon passage with steep rocky walls on both sides, flying low over dark water in dim twilight conditions. The enclosed space creates a sense of confinement as the aircraft proceeds toward the canyon exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters at canyon exit

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open air over expansive body of water
executes a banking turn to the right while ascending slightly
target spotted notification appears on HUD with targeting reticle

agents.ego_description: banking right while exiting the canyon, acquiring distant targets on the HUD display

entered.detail: expansive dark water surface stretching to the horizon
industrial structures or ships visible on the horizon at the target location
isolated rock formation visible to the left after exiting the canyon

segments.scene_description: Breaking out of the confined canyon into open air over dark coastal waters, executing a banking maneuver to the right. The HUD flashes a target acquisition warning as distant industrial platforms come into view on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sea approach to distant platforms

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over open water toward the distant target platforms, maintaining course with the target locked on HUD

entered.detail: scattered rocky formations visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: Cruising steadily over the open water toward the distant target platforms, with the target marker remaining active on the HUD. The expansive dark sea stretches in all directions under the overcast twilight sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight path that transitions from the claustrophobic depths of a rocky canyon into a vast, open maritime expanse. It begins by navigating a narrow passage with steep walls, flying low over dark water under the dim light of twilight. As the aircraft breaks out of the confined canyon into the open air, the camera executes a banking maneuver to the right while the HUD flashes a target acquisition warning. The scene then expands across the dark coastal waters, shifting from the enclosed rock formations to an unobstructed view of the horizon. Finally, the camera cruises steadily over the expansive sea toward distant industrial platforms under an overcast twilight sky.
